nodes.itemHTML: • pyLoad - Lightweight, customizable and remotely manageable downloader for 1-click-hosting sites like rapidshare.com or uploaded.to. (Source Codestars2.7k) GPL-3.0 Python
• Radarr - Radarr is an independent fork of Sonarr reworked for automatically downloading movies via Usenet and BitTorrent, à la Couchpotato. (Source Codestars6.7k) GPL-3.0 C#
• GNUnet - Free software framework for decentralized, peer-to-peer networking. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 C

• Mibew - Mibew Messenger is an open-source live support application written in PHP and MySQL. It enables one-on-one chat assistance in real-time directly from your website. (Demo, Source Codestars442) Apache-2.0 PHP
• Postfix - Fast, easy to administer, and secure Sendmail replacement. IPL-1.0 C
• IMP - HORDE application that provides webmail access to IMAP and POP3 accounts. (Demo, Source Code) GPL-2.0 PHP
• Mailpile - Webmail client with search, filtering, encryption features and more. (Source Codestars8.7k) AGPL-3.0 Python
• FreeSWITCH - Scalable open source cross-platform telephony platform. (Source Code) MPL-2.0 C
• Buddycloud - Tools, libraries, services and a community to build user-to-user, group and social messaging into your app. Saves time. Scales up. Supports you. (Source Code) Apache-2.0 Java
• cartularystars172 - RSS reader, readability tool, article archiver, microblogger, social graph manager and reading list manager. CDDL-1.0 PHP
• Loomio - Loomio is a collaborative decision-making tool that makes it easy for anyone to participate in decisions which affect them. (Source Codestars2.1k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby
• Mastodon - Federated microblogging server, an alternative to GNU social. (Source Codestars30.1k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby

• OSSN - Open Source Social Network (OSSN) is a social networking software written in PHP. It allows you to make a social networking website and helps your members build social relationships, with people who share similar professional or personal interests. (Source Codestars898) GPL-2.0 PHP
• phpBB - Flat-forum bulletin board software solution that can be used to stay in touch with a group of people or can power your entire website. (Source Codestars1.6k) GPL-2.0 PHP
• Vanilla Forums - Simple and flexible forum software. (Source Codestars2.6k) GPL-2.0 PHP
• MongooseIM - Mobile messaging platform with a focus on performance and scalability. (Source Codestars1.5k) GPL-2.0 Erlang
• BigTree CMS - Straightforward, well documented, and capable written with PHP and MySQL. (Source Codestars199) LGPL-2.1 PHP
• GetSimple CMS - The Simplest Content Management System. Ever. (Source Codestars365) GPL-3.0 PHP
• Plone - Powerful open-source CMS system. (Source Code) ZPL-2.0 Python
• CoreDNS - Plugin driven DNS Server with support for proxying to Google's DNS-over-HTTPS. (Source Codestars9.8k) Apache-2.0 Go

• Evergreen - Highly-scalable software for libraries that helps library patrons find library materials, and helps libraries manage, catalog, and circulate those materials. (Source Codestars99) GPL-2.0 PL/pgSQL

• Koha - Enterprise-class ILS with modules for acquisitions, circulation, cataloging, label printing, offline circulation for when Internet access is not available, and much more. (Demo, Source Codestars402) GPL-3.0 Perl
• CommaFeed - Google Reader inspired self-hosted RSS reader. (Source Codestars1.9k) Apache-2.0 Java
• Kinto - Kinto is a minimalist JSON storage service with synchronisation and sharing abilities. (Source Code) Apache-2.0 Python

• Samba - Samba is the standard Windows interoperability suite of programs for Linux and Unix. It provides secure, stable and fast file and print services for all clients using the SMB/CIFS protocol. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 C
• Syncthing - Syncthing is an open source peer-to-peer file synchronisation tool. (Source Codestars47.1k) MPL-2.0 Go
• Files Sharingstars62 - Open Source and self-hosted files sharing application based on unique and temporary links. GPL-3.0 PHP

• admidio - Admidio is a free open source user management system for websites of organizations and groups. The system has a flexible role model so that it’s possible to reflect the structure and permissions of your organization. (Demo, Source Codestars195) GPL-2.0 PHP
• Mahara - Open Source fully featured web application to build students electronic portfolio. (Source Codestars96) GPL-3.0 PHP
• OpenGTS - Entry-level fleet tracking system. Supports variety of tracking devices and protocols. Comes with rich web-interface and reporting features. (Demo, Source Code) Apache-2.0 Java
• Restreamer - Restreamer allows you to do h.264 real-time video streaming on your website without a streaming provider. (Source Codestars2.3k) Apache-2.0 Nodejs/Docker
• Monica - Personal relationship manager, and a new kind of CRM to organize interactions with your friends and family. (Source Codestars17.3k) AGPL-3.0 PHP
• Akaunting - Akaunting is a free, online and open source accounting software designed for small businesses and freelancers. (Source Codestars5.6k) GPL-3.0 PHP
• Inventaire - Collaborative resources mapper project, while yet only focused on exploring books mapping with wikidata and ISBNs. (Source Codestars351) AGPL-3.0 Nodejs

• PartKeepr - PartKeepr is an electronic part inventory management software. It helps you to keep track of your available parts and assist you with re-ordering parts. (Demo, Source Codestars1.1k) GPL-3.0 PHP
• Leanote - Leanote, Not Just A Notepad! Open source cloud notepad. (Demo, Source Codestars11k) GPL-2.0 Go
• PhotoLightstars42 - The easiest photo gallery there is. GPL-3.0 PHP

• Squid - Caching proxy for the Web supporting HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, and more. It reduces bandwidth and improves response times by caching and reusing frequently-requested web pages. (Source Code) GPL-2.0 C
• Kallithea - Source code management system that supports two leading version control systems, Mercurial and Git, with a web interface. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 Python
• Octobox ⚠ - Take back control of your GitHub Notifications. (Source Codestars4.2k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby
• Tuleap - Tuleap is a libre suite to plan, track, code and collaborate on software projects. (Source Code) GPL-2.0 PHP
• Bugzilla - General-purpose bugtracker and testing tool originally developed and used by the Mozilla project. MPL-2.0 Perl
• Documize - Modern Docs + Wiki software with built-in workflow, single binary executable, just bring MySQL/Percona. (Source Codestars1.7k) AGPL-3.0 Go
• PineDocsstars95 - Simple, fast, customizable and lightweight site for browsing files. GPL-3.0 PHP
• Tour of Heroes - An app which covers the core fundamentals of AngularDart.
• AmIUnique - Learn how identifiable you are on the Internet (browser fingerprinting tool). (Source Codestars637) MIT Java
• Ghost - Just a blogging platform. (Source Codestars41.5k) MIT Nodejs
• Shaarlistars2.8k - Personal, minimalist, super-fast, no-database bookmarking and link sharing platform. (Demo) Zlib PHP

• Hawkpost - HawkPost is a web app that lets you create unique links that you can share with a person that desires to send you important information but doesn't know how to encrypt it. The message is encrypted in their browser and sent to your email address. (Source Codestars898) MIT Python
• Rocket.Chat - Teamchat solution similar to Gitter.im or Slack. (Source Codestars33.5k) MIT Nodejs
• Tuber - Peer-to-peer video chat that works. (Source Codestars359) MIT Javascript
• MailHogstars10.9k - Small Golang executable which runs an SMTP MTA gateway that accepts all mail and displays in web interface. Useful for debugging or development. MIT Go
• Umbraco - The friendly CMS. Free and open source with an amazing community. (Source Codestars3.7k) MIT .NET
• RSS Monsterstars373 - RSS Monster is an easy to use web-based RSS aggregator and reader compatible with the Fever API, created as an alternative for Google Reader. MIT PHP
• Uguu - Stores files and deletes after X amount of time. (Source Codestars531) MIT PHP
• Musical Artifacts - Helping to catalog, preserve and free the artifacts you need to produce music. (Source Codestars80) MIT Ruby
• Notica - Lets you send browser notifications from your terminal to your desktop or phone. No installation or registration is required. (Source Codestars304) MIT Nodejs
• StockazNG - Asset Management System. MIT Python
• Meemo - Personal notes stream with Markdown support. (Source Codestars295) MIT Nodejs
• OpenNotestars1.5k - OpenNote was built to be an open web-based alternative to Microsoft OneNote (T) and EverNote. (Demo) MIT HTML5
• keeweb - This webapp is a browser and desktop password manager compatible with KeePass databases. (Source Codestars11.2k) MIT HTML5
• PrivateBin - PrivateBin is a minimalist, opensource online pastebin/discussion board where the server has zero knowledge of hosted data. (Demo, Source Codestars4.4k) Zlib PHP
• Gallery CSS - Gallery.css is all CSS. Think: Simple, maintainable and understandable galleries without the use of Javascript. (Source Codestars1.1k) MIT CSS
• sigalstars767 - Yet another simple static gallery generator. MIT Python

• Bonobo Git Server - Set up your own self hosted git server on IIS for Windows. Manage users and have full control over your repositories with a nice user friendly graphical interface. (Source Codestars1.7k) MIT C#

• Taskwarrior - Taskwarrior is Free and Open Source Software that manages your TODO list from your command line. It is flexible, fast, efficient, and unobtrusive. It does its job then gets out of your way. (Source Code) MIT C++
• Dynamic Domain Name services: Afraid.org, Pagekite
• Chrome Bug Report - Chrome related bugs
• WebKit Bugzilla - Safari related bugs
• C++ tutorial - A user ranked online tutorial bank site displaying multiple courses to learn C++ from.
• Khronos Dev Toolsstars172 - Useful WebGL developer tools, intended to be used as an ES6 module.
• ServerlessOps - Design, build and run reliable serverless systems.

• Blockchain clients
    • Bittrex.Netstars138 - C# .Net wrapper for the Bittrex web API including all features easily accessible and usable.
    • Binance.Netstars819 - .Net API wrapper for the Binance web API.
• consuldotnet - .NET API for Consul.
• Docker.DotNetstars1.8k - .NET (C#) Client Library for Docker API.
• Microphonestars454 - Lightweight framework to run self hosting REST services using Web Api or NancyFx ontop of a Consul or ETCD cluster.
• PreStormstars15 - Parallel REST Client for ArcGIS Server.
• tweetinvistars946 - Intuitive .NET C# library to access the Twitter REST and STREAM API.
• SuperSocketstars3.4k - Light weight, cross platform and extensible socket server application framework.
• Lightgl.jsstars1.4k - Lightweight and explict library to help prototype.
